productDisplayName: Lotto Men Revenge 02 Royal Blue Floater
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Revenge floaters from lotto. This pair can be teamed with cargo shorts and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot and ankles for comfort and protection Adjustable forefoot and ankle strap for customised Fit Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for tightening Lightly padded straps for snug fit Midsole Grooved footbed for added comfort Outsole Outsole with leaf like pattern for great grip on wet surfaces Flex grooves below the forefoot and heel area for flexible movement of the feet shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
